The [[Crozo Industrial Products/Legends|Crozo]] '''3-MAL personal comlink''' was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]. It monitored "Standard Clear Frequencies" for civil defense warnings and for important information about local regulations and medical or governmental facilities in the vicinity.

==Description==
The 3-MAL private [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] was manufactured by [[Crozo Industrial Products/Legends|Crozo Industrial Products]].<ref name="EGWT" /> A small cylindrical device with simple controls,<ref name="AE" /> it was a military-issue comlink featuring limited encryption modules that were designed to prevent eavesdropping.<ref name="EGWT" />

The comlink was capable of transmitting and receiving on hundreds of channels, and automatically monitored [[Standard Clear Frequency|Standard Clear Frequencies]] for emergency broadcasts. The 3-MAL had a range of fifty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]], capable of reaching low [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]].<ref name="AE" />

==History==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] used the 3-MAL extensively, and issued it to their naval [[Soldier/Legends|troops]] and ground forces. The comlink was used by units stationed on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and other facilities.<ref name="EGWT" />
